default.title: Horizon Tech | Enterprise lojisyèl, nwaj ak AI
default.description: Horizon Tech konsepsyon ak delivre lojisyèl antrepriz, solisyon AI, enfrastrikti nwaj, ak pwodwi dijital pou ekip anbisye.

home.title: Horizon Tech | Sistèm Jeni ki echèl
home.description: Enterprise lojisyèl, AI / ML, enfrastrikti nwaj, ak IoT livrezon pou ekip mondyal yo.

about.title: Konsènan Horizon Tech | Misyon Konpayi ak Ekip
about.description: Aprann sou Horizon Tech, misyon nou an, ak ki jan nou delivre solisyon teknoloji enpak segondè.

team.title: Ekip | Horizon Tech Lidèchip ak ekspè
team.description: Rankontre enjenyè yo ak lidè bati lojisyèl antrepriz ak platfòm nwaj nan Horizon Tech.

careers.title: Karyè | Bati ak Horizon Tech
careers.description: Eksplore wòl ouvè ak grandi karyè ou ak ekip jeni Horizon Tech.

contact.title: Kontakte Horizon Tech | Kòmanse Pwojè ou
contact.description: Jwenn an kontak ak Horizon Tech diskite sou pwojè ou, bezwen teknik, ak delè livrezon.

caseStudies.title: Ka etid | Rezilta Horizon Tech
caseStudies.description: Li ka etid kliyan ak rezilta delivre pa Horizon Tech atravè endistri yo.

blog.title: Blog | Horizon Tech Insights
blog.description: Sur teknik, leson livrezon, ak konsèy achitekti soti nan Horizon Tech.

education.title: Edikasyon | Horizon Tech Aprantisaj Resous
education.description: Gid, referans ak resous aprantisaj teknik soti nan Horizon Tech.

support.title: Sipò | Horizon Tech
support.description: Jwenn resous sipò ak opsyon kontak pou sèvis Horizon Tech.

privacy.title: Règleman sou enfòmasyon prive | Horizon Tech
privacy.description: Li politik vi prive Horizon Tech ak angajman pwoteksyon done yo

terms.title: Regleman pou Sèvis | Horizon Tech
terms.description: Li tèm sèvis Horizon Tech pou sit entènèt nou an ak sèvis yo.

profile.title: Pwofil | Horizon Tech
profile.description: Jere pwofil Horizon Tech ou, anviwònman ak detay kont.

firstTimeSetup.title: Premye fwa mete kanpe | Horizon Tech
firstTimeSetup.description: Ranpli konfigirasyon kont premye fwa kontinye nan Horizon Tech.

forgotPassword.title: Bliye modpas | Horizon Tech
forgotPassword.description: Reyajiste aksè nan kont Horizon Tech ou

resetPassword.title: Reyajiste modpas | Horizon Tech
resetPassword.description: Kreye yon nouvo modpas pou kont Horizon Tech ou

confirmEmail.title: Konfime Imèl | Horizon Tech
confirmEmail.description: Konfime adrès imel ou pou aktive kont Horizon Tech ou.

admin.title: Panèl Admin | Horizon Tech
admin.description: Espas travay administrasyon pou jesyon platfòm Horizon Tech.

unauthorized.title: san otorizasyon | Horizon Tech
unauthorized.description: Ou pa gen aksè kounye a paj sa a Horizon Tech.

services.title: Sèvis | Horizon Tech
services.description: Eksplore sèvis Horizon Tech nan jeni lojisyèl, AI, nwaj, DevOps, ak transfòmasyon dijital.

innovationLab.title: Laboratwa inovasyon | Horizon Tech
innovationLab.description: Gade eksperyans Horizon Tech ak pwototip nan AI ak aplike Jeni

authCallback.title: Siyen Nan | Horizon Tech
authCallback.description: Ranpli siyen an sekirite pou kont Horizon Tech ou.
